name: YorunoBrowser Official Source
subtitle: Welcome to Underground Apps Hub. Made for me and you.

apps.name: YorunoBrowser
apps.subtitle: HLS/MP4/ImageBulk downloader, OneHanded UI.
apps.localizedDescription:
YorunoBrowser is a one-handed iOS browser and file manager built for late-night browsing and media saving.

Features:
• HLS / MP4 / bulk image downloading with a single tap
• Forced dark mode (Smart / All-invert)
• Ad blocker with per-site exceptions
• Popup & transparent overlay blocker
• One-handed UI — gestures and controls consolidated at the bottom
• Tab groups
• Built-in file manager with list/grid views, sorting, and file conversion
• LikeTime timestamps — jump to favorite scenes in video/audio
• SelectToSearch — search selected text with custom keywords
• Pitch correction / voice changer removal (bulk)

Subscription plans: Free (10 DL/day) / Standard / Pro / Premium / Supporter
